title: Lock workstation when unattended
why_it_matters: BadUSB-style attacks depend on a device being able to interact with an unlocked computer.

title: Use only authorized USB devices
why_it_matters: Unknown USB devices may act as keyboards, storage devices, or other trusted peripherals.

title: Use a non-admin daily account
why_it_matters: Least privilege reduces the impact of accidental or unauthorized actions.

title: Restrict physical access to server console
why_it_matters: Physical access to a server can bypass many network-based protections.

title: Document authorized USB security training
why_it_matters: Documenting training helps prove that testing was authorized, safe, and educational.
